title: Camps * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Camps * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Former Foster Children Foster Children Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KINDRED MATTERS SIBLING CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A week-long residential camp providing separated siblings the opportunity to build positive memories through activities like campfires, swimming, and shared celebrations Eligibility: Separated siblings aged 8–18 living apart due to foster care, adoption, or other circumstances Hours: Varies (458) 888-9356 Visit Website More Details KINDRED MATTERS FAMILY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Resource families attend expert-led workshops and community activities while volunteers provide childcare Eligibility: Resource Parents Hours: Varies Email (458) 888-9356 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
